creator: herbert@gojira.at
text:
The below patch updates deskutils/calcurse to version 1.5.
It's also available at:
	 http://norway.ath.cx/calcurse_1_5.diff

Fix: ----
 
 PORTNAME=		calcurse
-PORTVERSION=		1.3
+PORTVERSION=		1.5
 CATEGORIES=		deskutils
-MASTER_SITES=		${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL}
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	arved
+MASTER_SITES=		ftp://ftp2.culot.org/culot/
 
 MAINTAINER=		h.skuhra@gmail.com
 COMMENT=		A text-based personal organizer
@@ -18,7 +17,12 @@
 CONFIGURE_TARGET=	--build=${ARCH}-portbld-freebsd${OSREL}
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=		--prefix=${PREFIX}
 
-MAN1=			calcurse.1
-PLIST_FILES=		bin/${PORTNAME}
+.if defined(WITHOUT_NLS)
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-nls
+PLIST_SUB+=		NLS="@comment "
+.else
+USE_GETTEXT=		yes
+PLIST_SUB+=		NLS=""
+.endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>


------AhttPhLXGj1jwclYw0bpHs3a3WxwBYzhUcdzJ5n9bNxCpOKl
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ruN deskutils/calcurse.bak/Makefile deskutils/calcurse/Makefile
--- deskutils/calcurse.bak/Makefile	Sat Aug 26 18:33:30 2006
+++ deskutils/calcurse/Makefile	Sat Aug 26 19:28:50 2006
@@ -5,10 +5,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/deskutils/calcurse/Makefile,v 1.3 2006/04/15
13:39:16 arved Exp $
